solution:
# Analysis

## 1. What This Project/System Is
Fintech paycheck advance platform (Current.com) - financial service offering early access to earned wages.

## 2. Key Components
- Mobile app (primary interface for feature access)
- Web presence (current.com)
- Eligibility determination system
- Paycheck Advance feature
- Terms & Conditions management

## 3. Issues / Risks
- **Incomplete data**: WEB source shows truncated content (cuts off mid-word: "finan")
- **No repo/local data**: Missing codebase, infrastructure, deployment information
- **No error logs**: Cannot assess operational health
- **Limited visibility**: Only website copy available; no metrics, monitoring, or system status data

## 4. Improvements / Next Steps
- Provide Git repository structure and CI/CD pipeline configuration
- Supply application logs, error tracking, and monitoring dashboards
- Include infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation, K8s manifests)
- Document deployment pipeline and release process
- Provide performance/availability metrics
- Include security scanning and compliance audit results
